repair_reason: Prior generate (d870e12d) had two code defects that must both be fixed. (1) Makefile binary-name mismatch: line 10 hard-assigns non-overridable `BIN = dynamics_advdiff_flux_1d_upwind_center2_runner`, but Build records the canonical binary as `advdiff_flux_1d_uc2` (the pipeline slug advdiff-flux-1d-uc2 underscored). During Validate.execute the test target guard `test -x $(BINDIR)/$(BIN)` cannot find that name and RELINKS a fresh binary into the read-only canonical binary dir => unauthorized write => fail_closed. Fix: make the Makefile output binary name consistent end-to-end with the canonical name Build records — set the default BIN to `advdiff_flux_1d_uc2` (and/or make it overridable `BIN ?=` AND ensure the test/run target never relinks an already-built binary). Follow docs/workflow/phases/phase_03_build.md and docs/workflow/MCP_COMMAND_LOG_PLACEMENT.md for the canonical binary-naming and cross-phase Make-rule contract. (2) Runner l0_invalid_a (a<=0) sets guard_ok=true and omits input_guard from verdict.failed_checks; tests.md sec6 l0_invalid_a_xfail pass_when requires verdict.overall==fail with input_guard present in failed_checks. Fix the runner so the a<=0 case reports verdict.overall=fail with input_guard in failed_checks per tests.md sec6/sec7. The compile io_contract in ir advdiff-flux-1d-uc2_20260620_001 is the reference per-case verdict design.
